scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @shopclip/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @shopclip/api --filter @shopclip/web --parallel --stream dev
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @shopclip/shared build && corepack pnpm -r typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @shopclip/shared build && corepack pnpm -r test
